pattern: Fill the grid the same way you would read it spirally - walk inward between four shrinking boundaries, writing the next counter value into each cell.
hints: This is the reverse of reading a matrix in spiral order: instead of collecting values, you deposit 1, 2, 3, ... as you sweep.
Keep four walls and a counter; lay the counter along the top, right, bottom, then left edge, retracting each wall after you use it.

Loop while top <= bottom and left <= right: fill the top row left to right, the right column top to bottom, the bottom row right to left, the left column bottom to top, incrementing the counter on every write and shrinking the matching boundary.

edge_inputs.description: odd side with a single center cell
four by four exercises the inner ring
five by five has an interior odd center

stress.description: sweep every legal n so all ring shapes are covered
stress.note: n is bounded by the constraint 1..20
